title: lepidaploa frangulifolia
intro: Lepidaploa frangulifolia, also known as a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is native to tropical regions. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Lepidaploa frangulifolia is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
